name: West of House
description: You are standing in an open field west of a dilapidated red house that looks like it has survived several regrettable decisions and learned nothing from them. The paint peels in long strips, revealing older, angrier layers beneath. The front door is boarded shut with uneven planks, as if the house itself requested boundaries. The grass around it is suspiciously well-kept, which only makes the structure seem more judgmental. A small mailbox nearby regards you with quiet disappointment, as though it had higher hopes for who would eventually show up.

interactables.name: leaflet
interactables.description:
**WELCOME TO DUNGEON-1**

*CONGRATULATIONS. You are now a participant in a text-based treasure hunt through the ruins of a collapsed underground empire. Your goal: collect treasures, deposit them in the trophy case inside the house, and try not to die in ways that are embarrassing to describe.*

*There is no help line. There is no hint system. There is only you, the parser, and whatever terrible decisions you make next.*

*Good luck. You'll need it.*
